item.title: Anthropic's Pentagon Clash Ignites AI Governance Crisis
item.description: Ever wondered how a heated dispute with the Pentagon could catapult an AI app to the top of the charts? Anthropic's clash is revealing the shaky foundations of AI self-regulation, while sparking massive app downloads and fueling a frenzy of billion-dollar infrastructure investments—let's unpack what this means for the future.
